title: FloristryWarehouse Oasis Naylorbase Posy Pad 12 Inch x 2
features: Oasis Naylorbase plastic backed Posy Pads with new Max life foam
The brand of choice for designers around the world
5cm depth of Oasis foam with quick saturation and low drainage
Can also be used for artificial flowers
description: Pack of two 12 inch (31cm) genuine Oasis« Naylorbase« plastic backed Posy Pads with new Max life foam giving up to 50% longer flower life. Super strong injection moulded plastic base. 5cm depth of OASIS« foam with quick saturation and low drainage. Water reservoir Anti-slip feet prevent movement and damage. Plastic lip provides support for foliage and decoration ribbon. Can also be used for artificial flowers. For 35 years Oasis« Naylorbase« has set the standard by which all other foams and bases are measured. Today it remains the brand of choice for designers around the world. Actual colour may vary a little from the photo depending on your monitor settings. All sizes are approx imate.
